text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The day of the Takarazuka Kinen is here. In a
matter of moments, the Empress, Air Groove, will
face off against the Otherworldly Front Runner,
Silence Suzuka.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The crowd can scarcely wait for the epic contest
to finally begin.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
When the two rivals come face to face, they
exchange only a few brief words before making
their way to the track.
